entry.title: New: Bill 28, CD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO AMEND THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT CLASSIFICATION FROM AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO URBAN DISTRICT (CONDITIONAL DISTRICT BOUNDARY AMENDMENT) FOR PROPERTY SITUATED AT WAILUKU, MAUI, HAWAII, PORTION OF TAX MAP KEY (2) 3-3-001:106" This bill relates to the Hale Mahaolu Ke Kahua Affordable Housing Community Project.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
